positive: An intricate, stylized illustration of a crescent moon cradling a cluster of luminous, geometric constellations. The overall style should be neo-Art Deco mixed with celestial botanical etching, featuring deep navy blues, metallic gold leaf accents, and pops of emerald green luminescence. The central composition should be highly symmetrical, designed to look excellent as a repeating, non-distracting motif on fabric. Emphasize clean linework, strong negative space, and high contrast between the glowing elements and the dark background. The composition must be suitable for screen printing or high-quality textile printing, presenting a mystic yet elegant feel.
negative: photorealistic, photographic, gradient, blurry, low detail, text, watermark, logo, signature, ugly, artifacts, messy, clutter, excessive shading, muted colors, extra limbs, deformed, noisy, grain
